---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest a new skill for the portfolio
title: "[SKILL] "
labels: enhancement, skill-request
assignees: []
---

## Skill name

What should the skill be called? (lowercase, hyphenated)

## What would it do?

A one-paragraph description of the skill's purpose.

## Why is it empowering?

Who benefits from this skill and how?

## Suggested category

- [ ] DevOps & Infrastructure
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] Utility
- [ ] Meta

## Suggested tier

- [ ] Core (broadly useful)
- [ ] Featured (category-strong)
- [ ] Utility (specific workflow)

## Similar existing skills (if any)

Are there existing skills that are close but not quite? Link them.
